title: UX Researcher
description: CrowdStrike is seeking a UX Researcher to uncover customer insights that drive product innovation. You'll conduct user research, analyze usability data, and translate findings into design improvements. Work hybrid from Ann Arbor for the leading cybersecurity platform protecting enterprises.
responsibilities: Conduct user interviews and usability testing with customers
Analyze user behavior data and identify pain points
Collaborate with product and design teams
Develop testing methodologies and research plans

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Psychology, HCI, Design, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
